author: Sheldon
name: QAT Int6 + MLP3 + Sliding Window + Overtone Init
blurb: Submission-style code snapshot for the first int6 QAT branch: per-row int6 QAT, packed int6 export, explicit MLP_HIDDEN sizing, sliding-window eval, overtone embedding init, phase-transition resid_mix init, and full-budget warmdown. Metrics are intentionally left null because no verified H100 train log is checked in with this folder yet.
